## Installation

### From npm

```bash
npm install @your-scope/ui-kit react react-dom tailwindcss
```

### From GitHub Release

```bash
npm install https://github.com/$REPO/releases/download/v$VERSION/$TARBALL react react-dom tailwindcss
```

Or download the `.tgz` asset from this release and:

```bash
npm install ./path/to/$TARBALL react react-dom tailwindcss
```

### Peer dependencies

Requires `react`, `react-dom`, and `tailwindcss` in your project.
